title: Exz Enchants
description: 39 unique enchantments for Fabric 1.21–1.21.4, including swords, armor, tools, bows, crossbows, and fishing rods, with custom loot, villagers, structures, and multilingual support.
body:
# ✨ Exz Enchants: Expanding the Magic of Minecraft

Are you tired of the same old vanilla enchantments? Do you want more variety in combat, exploration, and resource gathering? **Exz Enchants** is here to completely overhaul your enchanting experience!

This mod adds **39 carefully balanced, fully functional custom enchantments** to Minecraft. Whether you want to unleash lightning on your enemies, swing across ravines like a ninja, or mine entire ore veins in seconds — there is an enchantment for every playstyle.

---

## 🌟 Why Download Exz Enchants?

- **Real Mechanics:** These aren't just stat boosts. You get actual new abilities: homing arrows, area-of-effect explosions, grappling hooks, and telekinesis.
- **Seamless Integration:** Enchantments can be found naturally in the world. Trade with Librarians, use the Enchanting Table, or brave dangerous structures to find rare treasure enchants.
- **Visual Feedback:** Every enchantment comes with custom particle effects, sounds, and visual cues. If you freeze an enemy, they will look frozen!
- **Highly Compatible:** Built natively for Fabric **1.21 - 1.21.4** using modern data-driven systems.

---

## ⚔️ Combat Arsenal (Swords)
Turn your blade into a weapon of mass destruction:
- **Lifesteal:** Heal yourself for the exact damage you deal to enemies.
- **Thunder Strike:** High chance to summon a real, devastating lightning bolt on your target.
- **Explosive Strike:** Create powerful (but block-safe) explosions on impact, blowing away groups of enemies.
- **Ice Aspect:** Slow and freeze your foes in their tracks while dealing bonus cold damage.
- **Magnet:** Instantly pull the exact drops and XP from the mob you just killed.
- *Also includes: Decapitation, Venom, True Strike, Wisdom, and Ignition.*

## 🛡️ Defensive Gear (Armor)
Protect yourself with magical wards:
- **Last Stand (Chestplate):** Cheat death! Survive a lethal hit with 1 HP and gain brief invulnerability (has a cooldown).
- **Dodge (Leggings):** A chance to completely evade any incoming damage.
- **Feather (Boots):** Greatly increases your jump height while passively reducing fall damage.
- **Magma Walker (Boots):** Walk safely across lava lakes by turning lava into temporary obsidian beneath your feet.
- *Also includes: Reflection, Swiftness, Night Owl, Regeneration, Steadfast, and Frozen Thorns.*

## ⛏️ Utility & Gathering (Tools)
Mining and woodcutting have never been so satisfying:
- **Veinminer:** Mine one ore block, and the entire connected vein breaks at once. Works on shovels too!
- **Drill:** Mine a massive 3x3 area with a single swing. Higher levels mine deeper!
- **Lumberjack:** Chop the bottom log of a tree, and the whole tree comes crashing down.
- **Smelting Touch:** Automatically smelt ores into ingots and sand into glass as you mine them.
- **Telekinesis:** Mined items teleport directly into your inventory.
- *Also includes: Eternal (Indestructible items) and Greater Fortune.*

## 🏹 Ranged Combat (Bow & Crossbow)
Master the art of archery:
- **Homing:** Arrows intelligently track the nearest target, prioritizing players over monsters.
- **Volley:** Fire a fan of 3, 5, or 7 arrows simultaneously.
- **Ender Shot:** Teleport instantly to exactly where your arrow lands.
- *Also includes: Explosive Arrows, Poison Arrows, and Frost Arrows.*

## 🎣 Fishing
- **Grapple:** Turn your fishing rod into a grappling hook! Hook a block and pull yourself towards it.
- **Double Catch:** A chance to pull up two items instead of one.

## 🔮 The Dark Arts (Curses & Universal)
Beware the dark magic found in dungeon chests:
- **Soul Bound:** An item stays in your inventory after death, but the enchantment is consumed.
- **Curse of Fragility:** Your item loses durability 3x faster.
- **Curse of Clumsiness:** A 15% chance to completely miss your attack.
- **Curse of Greed:** A 25% chance that the block you just mined drops nothing at all.

---

## 🗺️ Finding the Enchantments
Exz Enchants seamlessly integrates into vanilla gameplay:
- **Enchanting Table:** Most standard enchantments can be obtained normally.
- **Villagers:** Librarians trade almost all enchantments (except curses).
- **Structure Loot:** Every structure chest has been injected with custom loot tables.
- **Treasure Only:** Extremely powerful enchantments like *Eternal*, *Last Stand*, and *Soul Bound* cannot be crafted. You must find them in dangerous places like Ancient Cities, Bastions, and End Cities!
- **Trial Chambers:** Unique enchanted gear and books can be found in Vaults and Ominous Vaults.

---

### ⚙️ Requirements
- **Fabric Loader** (1.21 - 1.21.4)
- **Fabric API**

*Supports 21 languages out of the box!*
